# megaport_mcr_ipsec_addon (Resource)

Megaport MCR IPSec Add-On Resource. Attaches an IPSec tunnel add-on to an existing MCR. Valid tunnel counts are 10, 20, and 30. Only one IPSec add-on may be attached to an MCR at a time.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mcr_id` (String) The UID of the MCR to attach the IPSec add-on to.
- `tunnel_count` (Number) Number of IPSec tunnels. Valid values are 10, 20, and 30.

### Read-Only

- `add_on_uid` (String) UID of the IPSec add-on, assigned by the API.
- `last_updated` (String) Last updated by the Terraform provider.
